movie.actors: Reese Witherspoon, Chris Pine, Tom Hardy, Til Schweiger
movie.plot: A pair of C.I.A. operatives wage an epic battle against one another when they discover they are dating the same woman.
movie.title: This Means War
movie.writer: Timothy Dowling (screenplay), Simon Kinberg (screenplay), Timothy Dowling (story), Marcus Gautesen (story)
